title: viola tricolor var. major
intro: Viola tricolor var. major, also known as Heartsease, is a flowering plant in the violet family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Heartsease can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
